titleStmt.title: SII 30.189: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 189. (A.R. No. 265 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall of a maṇḍapa in a field adjoining the same temple Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa III: year 3: 1181 A.D.

summary.p: Incomplete. It registers the gift of eight vēli of land at Karaikōṭṭu-Brahmadēsam alias Dīnachintāmaṇi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Dāmarkōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam, by Uḻḻāvūr Kamban Vānadaraiyan which was his jīvitakkāṇi to the temple of Sri Pōndaiyuḍaiyār. Kaḍappēri and Sambuvarāyap-pērāru are mentioned. Kamban Vāṇadaraiyan might have been a headman of Dīnachintāmaṇichchaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīmekkirttikku mu
ṉṉākat tiripuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ śrī
kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yā
ṇṭu muṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇ
ṭacoḻamaṇṭalattut tā
maṟ koṭṭattut tāmar nāṭ
ṭuk karaikkoṭṭa brahmateca
māṉa diṉacintāmaṇiccatu
rvvetimaṅkalañ jivitamuṭai
ya Uḷḷāvūrk kampaṉ vāṇa
taraiyaṉeṉ Ivvūr Āḷuṭai
yār śrīpontaiyuṭaiyā
ṟku Ikkaraikkoṭṭa brahma
deśattu Eṉ jivitappaṟṟil
Āṟāṅkaṭṭaḷaiyiṟ tiruvitikku
kkiḻakkuṅ kaṭapperikku
t teṟkuñ campuvarāya
p perāṟṟukku meṟkum te
ṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār
paḻantevatāṉattukku va
ṭakkum Innāṟpāṟkellai
kku muṭpaṭṭa nilam Eṭṭu ve
li nilamum piḷḷaiyāṟkum
viṇṇappañ ceytu I
Digital edition of SII 30.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
